name: PixelOS
tagline: Unofficial Android 16 QPR2 build with sharper haptics, faster motion, and a simpler pacmanpro flashing experience.
maintenanceNote: Current focus: haptics, speed, and smoother setup on pacmanpro
highlights: Improved haptics give the build a crisper and more tactile feel.
App opening and closing animations are smoother and faster overall.
The pacmanpro flashing process is less complicated than before.
changelog: Improved haptics for a crisper feel.
Improved app opening and closing animations along with overall speed.
Resolved the complicated flashing process for pacmanpro.
Fenrir is not included by default.
Play Integrity is strong with Fenrir and basic without it as of March 23, 2026.
Sideloading and the first boot take longer than usual, so do not panic.
